channel.title: Diversity on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Diversity on Nature Works

item.title: It’s Behind You!
item.description:
Forging local connections

During my more low-level tasks, in amongst the flower beds and on the cutting room floor, my mind will often race ahead on the complexities of the Nature & Climate Emergency. http://localhost:1313/blog/230122-behind-you/

item.title: Diversity
item.description:
Notes for those who want to take positive action to improve the diversity of people involved with forest gardens and horticulture

87% of the UK identify as White. In the UK horticulture industry, the figure is 99%*. http://localhost:1313/diversity/
